title: verbascum cedretioides
intro: Verbascum cedretioides, also known as the Cedar-leaved Mullein or Verbascum cedretioides, is a plant species within the mullein family (Scrophulariaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum cedretioides include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to address various health concerns.
